Public FAR Labor Standards Excerpt

Line 1: This public-style excerpt is provided for extraction label validation.
Line 2: FAR 52.222-41, Service Contract Labor Standards, applies to covered service contracts and requires applicable labor standards.
Line 3: Wage determination attachment WD-2026-SYNTHETIC is referenced for test purposes only.
Line 4: FAR 52.204-27, Prohibition on a ByteDance Covered Application, applies to covered applications as stated in the clause.
